mayor.name: Mayor
mayor.dialogue: I founded this town after the Great Forgetting. We must protect its secrets.

npc: The village depends on the right person making the right choice.

who.npc: I am the mayor. I try to keep everyone safe and the town moving forward.

npc: The forest has grown strange, and our scouts have vanished.
If you can bring me the old map from the ruins, I will reward you.

accept.npc: Thank you. Return when you have news.

blacksmith.name: Blacksmith
blacksmith.dialogue: My hammer once broke a cursed sword. I need rare ore to forge a new one.

farmer.name: Farmer
farmer.dialogue: The soil is cursed. I need enchanted seeds to restore the fields.

guard.name: Guard
guard.dialogue: I patrol the forest edge every night. Something is watching us.

child.name: Child
child.dialogue: I saw something glowing near the bell tower. It whispered my name.
